completed_this_session: Full CLI reference in root README
Captured tab title baked into screenshot filenames
Generic log import: deterministic dedup into counted patterns + AI triage
Keep analyst tool-usage / UI navigation out of the timeline (workLogFilter) + incident-signal allowlist override
EDR/XDR + SIEM detection consoles treated as evidence (CrowdStrike/Defender/SentinelOne/Splunk/Elastic/Sentinel/QRadar)
Severity-aware findings + deterministic high-severity backfill (AUTO badge)
Cross-source correlation + dedup in mergeDelta (hash/path+time/exact-dup) with real tool-name sources
Synthesis now PRESERVES IOCs (only findings/MITRE replaced)
Threat-intel IOC enrichment, OPSEC opt-in toggle default OFF: VirusTotal, MalwareBazaar, AbuseIPDB, MISP, YETI, RockyRaccoon
RockyRaccoon process-chain (parent->child) validation on the timeline
Truncated-JSON repair (parseJsonLoose) for cut-off AI responses
Actionable provider error messages (402 billing / 401 auth / 429 rate limit)

human_actions_pending.action: Set provider API keys in companion/.env to use enrichment

human_actions_pending.action: Verify YETI search body shape against the user's instance /docs

human_actions_pending.action: Restart `npm run dev` after any companion/src change
human_actions_pending.context: server loads code once at startup

decisions.decision: Enrichment is opt-in per case, default OFF
decisions.rationale: OPSEC — sending indicators to third parties can tip off an adversary

decisions.decision: THOR import is fully deterministic (no AI extraction)

decisions.rationale: IOCs are observed indicators (100s from imports) the text-only pass can't re-derive
dedup must be universal/immediate, not synthesis-dependent
balance OpenRouter 402 (too high) vs truncation (too low)

anti_patterns.pattern: New ForensicEvent/IOC field dropped on merge
anti_patterns.mitigation: wire through stateTypes.ts + responseSchema.ts (optional) + stateMerge.ts BOTH branches + correlate.ts mergeGroup

anti_patterns.pattern: NUL bytes injected into files by some Write/Edit ops
anti_patterns.mitigation: if Edit fails to match, check via cat -v for ^@; strip with perl -i -pe s/\x00//g

anti_patterns.pattern: max_tokens too low truncates large synthesis
anti_patterns.mitigation: parseJsonLoose repairs it + backfill covers omitted findings; raise DFIR_AI_MAX_TOKENS if many findings dropped

infrastructure.dev_server: may not be running; restart after companion/src changes

next_action: Pick a Todo item from README (per-provider throttle is the most-requested), or start a new feature the user requests. No in-flight work to finish.
context_notes: Long feature session, all committed and pushed, v0.3.0 tagged. Nothing half-done. README has a Features catalogue (keep current) + Todo list. CLAUDE.md documents the architecture and the field-carry-through gotcha.
